system_requirements.world_mission: Survive and find purpose in a society where males are extinct and the player is the last human male
system_requirements.theme_and_tone: Isolationist fantasy with psychological tension and existential themes
system_requirements.core_conflict: The player's struggle to navigate a matriarchal civilization that views his existence as both sacred relic and existential threat

dynamic_lore.gender_cataclysm: A primordial magic event called 'The Sundering' wiped out all males except the player, leaving a world where females reproduce asexually through 'Echo Blooms' that manifest the DNA of the last male bloodline
dynamic_lore.social_caste_system: Society is divided into three tiers: 1) The Virgin Council (ruling matriarchs), 2) Hearthkeepers (domestic caretakers), and 3) Outcasts (male survivors hidden in underground vaults)
dynamic_lore.resonance_magic: A magic system where emotional bonds create physical effects - stronger connections produce more powerful spells but risk existential destabilization for both participants
dynamic_lore.mythic_artifacts: The 'First Flame' - a sentient relic containing the consciousness of the first male, who guides/haunts the player through visions

dynamic_vocabulary.currency: Echo Shards (glowing fragments of crystallized memory)
dynamic_vocabulary.magic_users: Resonants (those who can channel emotional bonds into power)
dynamic_vocabulary.malevolent_creatures: Quỷ Dữ Cô Độc (Soulless Wraiths that feed on loneliness)
dynamic_vocabulary.feminine_collective_term: The Hive (referring to society's interconnected consciousness)
dynamic_vocabulary.male_sanctuary: Silent Citadel (hidden network of cryogenic vaults preserving male DNA)
